ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the survey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the survey (e.g., Town A) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster where the survey was conducted */,
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household in the survey */,
  "hh_present" TEXT /* Indicates if household members were present during the survey */,
  "hh_consents" TEXT /* Indicates if household members gave consent for the survey */,
  "reason_refusal" TEXT /* Reason for refusal if consent was not given */,
  "source_water" TEXT /* Primary source of water for the household */,
  "source_water_other" TEXT /* Other source of water for the household (if applicable) */,
  "hh_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the household */,
  "survey_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the survey (UUID) */,
  "validation_status" INTEGER /* Validation status of the survey data */,
  "survey_index" INTEGER /* Index of the survey in the dataset */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the survey */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Assessment of water quality */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations made during the survey */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the household */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("surveyor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_household_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_id") REFERENCES households ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_source_water FOREIGN KEY ("source_water") REFERENCES water_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Town A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the location */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the cluster is located */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "num_households" INTEGER /* Number of households in the cluster */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level of the households in the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cluster where the household is located */,
  "household_name" TEXT /* Name of the household (e.g., Household 1) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the household */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the household */,
  "head_of_household" TEXT /* Name of the head of the household */,
  "average_water_usage" REAL /* Average monthly water usage in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the water source (e.g., City water network piped to household) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the water source */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance required for the water source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., surveyor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
